heading: Omitted
label: 724 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided for cancellation of certain indebtedness effective on the date of the proclamation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Aug. 23, 1954, ch. 831, § 468 Stat. 769
